items.title: Controlled inputs: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? Providing an initial defaultValue makes an input controlled forever.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. A controlled input uses value plus an update handler; defaultValue initializes an uncontrolled input.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. A controlled input uses value plus an update handler; defaultValue initializes an uncontrolled input.
